steps.t: Brambles can be found throughout north-eastern Fangorn Forest. Quickbeam has asked you to clear the brambles from Fangorn Forest before planting the s…
The Easeful Mead can be found to the north of Derndingle, across the river Entwash. You have cleared the forest of brambles and should now plant the s…
Mounds of fertile earth can be found near the Easeful Mead in northern Fangorn Forest. You have arrived at the Easeful Mead with the seeds of Orofarnë…
Quickbeam can be found in Derndingle in Fangorn Forest. You have cleared the woods of brambles and planted the seeds of Quickbeam's fallen friends.
